name: Gustav
title: The Analyst
mechanicsDetail: Mystic Mechanics: Shields, Shards, Debuffs, Stall.

startingAbility.name: Blizzard
startingAbility.rawText: Create a Blizzard for 5 seconds. Each second, inflict 1 (+1 per 8 Mana Regen) Frost and deal 10 (+50% Magic) damage to enemies inside the Blizzard. Shield Heroes inside it for 10 (+100% Magic).

rankBSpecializations.name: The Investor
rankBSpecializations.rawText: At start of combat, spend 4 Shards to give Gustav an Investment. Give all Heroes 2 Mana Regen per Investment. Backup. Every 5 Investments, gain 30 Shards.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Glacier
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Blizzard applies 100% Defense more Shields and always targets Gustav. After Stall (25 and Stall 50), permanently gain 2 (+2 per rank) Defense.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Avalanche
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On cast, gain 1 Shard. On Shards generated, gain 1 Mana Regen and 5 Magic.

quote: I've been wanting to test a scenario like this.
